title: Control Pain
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{ForcePower |image= |name=Control Pain |alternate= |alignment= |area=Control[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] |purpose=Allow the individual to control the pain felt by their own body |inventor= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Luke! Are you all right?"
"''(Cough.)'' Sure. ''(Pant.)'' Just a flesh wound. I'll be okay.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|}} '''Control Pain''' was a Control-based [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] that could be used to reduce the pain suffered as a result of injury or of other reason. ==Description== [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-users]] could use Control Pain to suppress the effects of a pain-inflicting injury, and continue to function as if they were not wounded. However, even though the pain was reduced, the injury would remain and still needed to be treated, either through the use of [[Force healing/Legends|Force healing]] or through medical methods. It could also be used to ignore pain affecting the individual that was not from a wound. Control Pain could also be used to negate the effect of a [[Stun/Legends|stun]] blast, allowing the individual to operate as normal.''[[The Star Wars Rules Companion]]'' ==Users== *[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] ==Appearances== *{{InsiderCite|130|The Tenebrous Way|reprint=1}} *[[Republic 53|''Republic'' 53]] {{Flash}} *{{JournalCite|6|To Fight Another Day|reprint=1}}
